selection.selection_reasoning: Selected WORLD-AI_LABORATORY (AI Laboratory) for topic='How Artificial Intelligence Learns Patterns' via semantic overlap=0.4 and accuracy=75

world.name: AI Laboratory

environment.description: Dim AI lab with rack glow, holographic neural volumes, and black reflective floor

lighting.base: low-key rack practicals + cyan holo glow

design_rules: Keep set geometry continuous across scenes
Vary camera and lighting, not the world itself
Every object must sit on a defined surface
scientific_constraints: Hologram volume stays at stage center unless moved by state event
